enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his second day in Boulder, recapping a late-night cleaning and reorganizing session, a store run to exchange ink and buy supplies, visiting his mom and son to pay rent, and his current routine of watching DS9 while jump-roping and browsing Wikipedia.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: stayed up until 6:30am cleaning and reorganizing, views it positively
frustrated — considers it a bummer since he likes listening to music loudly

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-log for the second. This will be the second day where I do it for the actual day that I'm doing it.
Yesterday I was really busy all night until about 6.30 in the morning or something.
Did all kinds of stuff that I didn't do since I moved here.
Cleaned the refrigerator, cleaned under the refrigerator.
And then, yeah, I just reorganized the whole house.
I mean, clean up of the outside of the living room and not just my bedroom.
And, yeah.
Oh, yeah, and I bought a fan and I put it, or I didn't buy a fan.
I grabbed my fan that I have and I put it up on my ceiling so that I can activate my beanie hat.
And then I put even reflectors on it so that you can see the halo go around.
It'll be awesome for when I sing a song against dance.
And what else?
So then I got up at, like, 1.
And went over to the store and exchanged the ink.
I got the wrong ink.
And then went and got the electrical tape and some other stuff.
And then, oh, yeah, I went over to my mom's house to pay rent and hung out with her for a little bit.
And then came back here and printed up these papers.
Bike racer level.
Google Earth.
I'll show it.
When I paste it to the wall.
And then I'm going to just fill up my walls.
But then I'll cover it up again with cloth, I think.
For, you know, special occasions or something.
For when I film around.
Not all my pictures are decent.
So what else?
I'm watching Medici right now.
I'm on, like, episode 5.
I'm not really watching it.
I have my Roku.
And I'm listening to it with my earphones.
And then I'll do the Wikipedia, I think.
Maybe I'll do a YouTube video about it later.
But, um, I lost my good earphones, though.
It's a bummer.
Because I like to listen to music every once in a while.
I had two good earphones and they're both just vanished.
My second good one's yesterday, so.
Um, how many minutes is this video?
That's probably enough talking.
I didn't really feel like talking anyway.
Okay, peace out.
